title: NARUTO SHIPPUDEN: Ultimate Ninja STORM Revolution

notes: Install dependencies on first run but won't open anything else. Second run foward just won't do anything when play button is clicked.
title: NARUTO SHIPPUDEN: Ultimate Ninja STORM Revolution

notes:
Steps to get it running:
1. The normal launcher doesn't work. First rename original NSUNSR_launcher.exe to NSUNSR_launcher.exe.bak, then link or copy NSUNSR.exe to NSUNSR_launcher.exe.
2. Without launcher you need to adjust video settings manually. Open NSUNSR.ini with text editor and set width= and height= to match your desktop, and windowed=0 to play in full screen.
3. After that game runs normally from Steam.
In windowed mode graphics had different glitches, but they were gone in full screen mode.
title: NARUTO SHIPPUDEN: Ultimate Ninja STORM Revolution

notes: Had to rename filenames and change ini file as described below. Game works fine, with some minor visual and audio glitches during scenes, but works great during matches. X360 Controller worked just fine too.
title: NARUTO SHIPPUDEN: Ultimate Ninja STORM Revolution
